session.user:
Run these commands and report results. Do NOT modify any files.
1. `ruff check src/erk/cli/commands/pr/dispatch_cmd.py tests/commands/pr/test_dispatch.py` 2. `pytest tests/commands/pr/test_dispatch.py -v`
Report the output verbatim.
session.assistant: I'll run both commands and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: uv run ruff check src/erk/cli/commands/pr/dispatch_cmd.py tests/commands/pr/test_dispatch.py
Check ruff linting for dispatch command files

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run pytest on dispatch command tests with verbose output
